---
title: Mechanisms that control the latitude of jet streams and surface westerlies
pagetitle: 2007-7-1-Chen2007 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2007
author: Chen, Gang
venue: Ph.D. thesis, Princeton University
venue_cit: Ph.D. thesis, Princeton University, 153 pp.
recommended_citation: 'Chen, Gang, 2007: Mechanisms that control the latitude of jet
  streams and surface westerlies, Ph.D. thesis, Princeton University, 153 pp.'
paper_url: /files/thesis.pdf
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Mechanisms that control the latitude of jet streams and surface westerlies

*Published in Ph.D. thesis, Princeton University, 2007*

**Recommended citation:** Chen, Gang, 2007: Mechanisms that control the latitude of jet streams and surface westerlies, Ph.D. thesis, Princeton University, 153 pp.

[Download paper](/files/thesis.pdf){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
